text:
The was the original royal family of Eldia that used the power of the Founding Titan to rule over their lands. After the Great Titan War, the family split in two, with some staying on the mainland continent that was conquered by Marley, and the others entering the Walls that Karl Fritz had built. The branch that went inside the Walls disguised themselves as a minor noble family known as the Reiss family.

By 824, Dina Fritz was the last descendant of the royal family still living in the mainland. Dina then joined a rebellious organization but was caught and turned into a Pure Titan. Although the royal bloodline lives on with the Reiss family, the Fritz name is effectively extinct.

History

Around 2000 years ago, Ymir's village was attacked and enslaved by the Eldians, who then cut out their tongues. One day after a pig was released, the tribe's ruler called all of the slaves and asked for the culprit. The slaves all began to point at Ymir, who was then "freed" only to be hunted by dogs and men.

Wounded and desperate, Ymir took shelter in a nearby tree, but as soon as she stepped in, she slipped and fell into an underground body of water. There, she came into contact with a mysterious spine-like creature which attached to her back and triggered the first Titan transformation.

With her newfound power, Ymir returned to serve Karl Fritz and used her Titan to cultivate land, build bridges, and amass wealth for the Eldians. Under his command, she also destroyed the forces of Eldia's rival, Marley. To "reward" Ymir for her service, Fritz took her as his concubine and gave her his name and together the two had three children: Maria, Rose, and Sina.

After serving the king for 13 years, Ymir died while thwarting an assassination attempt on his life. After her death, Ymir found herself inside a mysterious land, meanwhile, the king forced his daughters to eat Ymir's corpse in an attempt to preserve the power of the Titans. He commanded the daughters to continue to reproduce and cannibalize each other so that Ymir's blood does not run out and Eldia could rule forever with its Titans. Ymir's powers became the Nine Titans and she continued to serve her descendants, building them Titans whenever they invoked the power of the Titans.

The Fritz family came to power as the royal bloodline of Eldia. Over these next two millennia, their lineage would be destined to remain unbroken. At some point during their rule, the Ackermann family became the guarding force of their monarchy, serving as the protectors of the monarchs.

After some time, the various elite families subservient to the Fritz family began to fight among themselves, though throughout the years the Fritz family maintained order with the power of the Founding Titan. However, when the 145th King of the Fritz family came into power and received the Founding Titan, he chose to abandon the never-ending conflict in the Eldian Empire and conspired with the Tybur family to end the conflict by letting the empire fall and restore Marley, a country that the Eldians have previously conquered and destroyed.

As both sides worked to dismantle the Eldian Empire that was in control, they fabricated the story of a great warrior Helos who came and was the one who had actually defeated the Eldians. The King then decided to instead move the capital of Eldia to Paradis Island off the east coast of the continental mainland. In his absence, the Marleyan minorities in Eldia took control of the Great Titan War, while capturing seven of the nine Titans and overrunning the continent.

As Eldia lost more and more of its land, King Fritz gathered as many members of the Fritz family as he could to Paradis Island, along with the fleeing peoples of Eldia. However, some members of the Fritz family strongly disagreed with the King's decision to abandon the Eldian-Marleyan conflict and stayed behind on the continental mainland.

Once the Eldians willing to flee were gathered at Paradis Island, the King used the power of the Founding Titan to erect three concentric Walls around their territory on Paradis Island and erased the memory of the world from the Eldian people. From that point onward, the Fritz family in the Walls would be replaced in name by a false line of monarchs, while the true royal family would take the new name of the Reiss family.

Meanwhile, on the mainland, the Fritz family would live in hiding within the internment zones founded by the new Marleyan government, awaiting the day that Eldia would rise again. At some point, the remnants of the Fritz family that stayed on the continent tried to form a revolutionary army. However, the army accomplished nothing and its members were executed.

By 824, Dina Fritz was the last living descendant of the Fritz family within Marley. She would be sent by the Owl, an Eldian spy within the Marleyan military, to join the cause of the Restorationists. There she met Grisha Jaeger, who had gained significant influence in the Restorationist movement, and together they made plans to retrieve the Founding Titan from Paradis Island and restore the nation of Eldia. They married the following year and had a son named Zeke Jaeger, who they insisted would be the King of Eldia.

However, Zeke ended up turning against the Restorationists at the age of seven after Grisha sent him to join the Marleyans' Warrior program, hoping that he would be a double agent. Dina would then be turned into a Pure Titan, pledging in her last moments that she would find Grisha no matter what became of her. Zeke would remain in the Warrior program; his paternal grandparents would become his guardians and Tom Xaver his mentor; eventually obtaining power of the Beast Titan in 842 from Xaver, Zeke would rise through the ranks to become the War Chief of the Warriors.

Story

The Fall of Shiganshina arc

Thirteen years after wandering as a Titan, Dina is among the many Titans that invade Shiganshina District in the year 845 when the Colossal Titan and Armored Titan breach the gates of Wall Maria. She wanders throughout the district until coming to the home of the Jaeger family, where Carla Jaeger, Grisha's second wife, lays helpless beneath the rubble of their ruined home as her children attempt to free her. As a Garrison soldier carries the children to safety, Dina pulls Carla out of the rubble, eating her as any normal Titan would.

Clash of the Titans arc

Eighteen years after his mother was made into a Titan, Zeke infiltrates Wall Rose. With his power as the Beast Titan, he turns the residents of Ragako village into Titans - spreading chaos throughout the territory for reasons unknown. He later leaves Wall Rose that night as members of the Scout Regiment try desperately to fight off his Titans.

Royal Government arc

Two months after his departure from Wall Rose, Zeke reunites with his Warrior subordinates Reiner Braun and Bertholdt Hoover in the ruins of Shiganshina District. The two argue with Zeke for the sake of their comrade Annie Leonhart, who had been captured two months prior. This leads Zeke to challenge Reiner to combat for the decision - which results in Reiner losing. Zeke determines that they will instead wait in Shiganshina for the Scout Regiment to arrive so that they can take the Founding Titan, known to them as the Coordinate.

Return to Shiganshina arc

When the Scout Regiment arrives in Shiganshina, Zeke and his Warriors battle with them both within and surrounding the district. Zeke makes use of his Beast Titan to deal heavy damage to the Scouts with rocks, fatally wounding their commander Erwin Smith. However, he is defeated by Levi Ackermann. After a hasty escape, Zeke retreats from Levi and encounters his half-brother Eren Jaeger. Before they part ways, Zeke promises Eren that he will one day return to save him.

Eren Jaeger and the surviving members of the Scout Regiment learn of the Fritz family and their connection with both the history of the Walls and Eren's father Grisha. After learning of his father's past, Eren begins to see his father's memories in his dreams due to their shared inheritance of the Coordinate, and Eren realizes that Dina Fritz was the Titan who ate his mother.

Marley arc

Shortly after the conclusion of the Marley Mid-East War, Colt, the designated successor of the Beast Titan, asks Zeke for the reason behind his Titan's unprecedented abilities. Zeke acts clueless, having kept his heritage a secret from Marley and the Titan Biology Research Society. Secretly conspiring against Marley, Zeke gains contact with Eren and orchestrates events leading up to the Liberio festival. There, the true history of Karl Fritz and Eldia's downfall is revealed to the audience, before the forces of Paradis Island attack the festival and deal a devastating blow to Marley. Zeke believes that uniting the Founding Titan with a Titan of royal blood was worth the plan's sacrifices, for its ability to restore Eldia's freedom.

Political members

Trivia

As seen with Zeke, if a member of the Fritz family were to inherit any of the other Nine Titans, outside of the Founding Titan, they would have gained powers similar to the Founding. This would have primarily allowed them to create new Titans through a Subject of Ymir ingesting their spinal fluid, and the inheritor then screaming. 
"Fritz" is a German diminutive of the German Friedrich and means "peaceful ruler".
